ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', CASE($RecordType.Name, 'New Business Opportunity', 1, 'Auto-Renewal Opportunity', 1, 'Manual Renewal Opportunity', 1,0) =0, Account.RecordType.Name = 'Customer Accounts' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV11: A Customer Account can only have a Customer or Non-Auto Renewal Opportunity.
